title: Just Messages
description: Replaces the vanilla messaging system with a better one.
body:
## ❓ Why should I install Just Messages?

✉️ Just Messages replaces the vanilla messaging system completely with a better one! It also adds some really nice commands, like:

- **/tpm** - Allows players to toggle their messages.
- **/reply** - Allows players to easily reply to others.

Just Messages also has **A LOT** of customization opportunities, because the config has around **38** options that you can **EASILY** customize!

⚡️ Improvements are released very often, as long as there's anything that I need to improve.

## ❗ How do I add Just Messages to my server?

Let me tell you that!

- First you need to install **Just Messages** with the Download button.
- After the file has downloaded, head to your server's files. You should see a **'plugins'** folder there, enter that folder and paste the file you just downloaded (**JustMessages.jar** or something similar) in that folder.
    Now start up your server and JustMessages should be in your server!

If you face any issues with **JustMessages**, please report them in the [discord](https://discord.gg/nKEa5NxRew).
## 👨‍💻 Server Compatibility

**Just Messages** was developed for the **Paper** server software, so it might not work if you're using something else than **Paper** as your server software. You must also be running a **1.20+** server to run **Just Messages**.

## 🐜 How do I report an issue or suggest things?

Suggestions and bug reports must be sent to my [discord server](https://discord.gg/nKEa5NxRew).
